-----------------------
Name: KM PSC Xtreme Shell Injector [2K26]
Creator: KMFDManic|Libretro
Injector By: KMFDManic
Category: KMFD Playstation Classic
Emulated System: Various
Testers: Anime Phoenix|Laserramon
Prerequisite: COPY entire contents of self extracting archive to Flash Drive; Password is kmfd; DOES NOT work with Project Eris.  Eris MUST be uninstalled, go to APPS in AutoBleem, select and install Custom Kernel if necessary, otherwise RetroArch may "crash"; Bios in retroarch/system; Cores in retroarch/cores; Info in retroarch/info; When opening RetroArch, a Magic Cube will display.  Simply go into RetroArch Settings to load content!  Virtual Ram will also be installed, to help prevent crashing of games.  Fat32 drive recommended, via USB Powered Hub in front port #2 of PSC!
-----------------------
